response.justification: The role demands 8 years of C++ programming experience as a hard minimum, plus substantial large-scale distributed-systems and cloud-compute platform leadership. The candidate's C++ exposure is limited to a ~6-month stint at National Instruments in 2014-2015; the rest of the career is JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/full-stack work. There is no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, large-scale distributed systems at the scale implied, or formal tech-lead mentoring of cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Long, varied engineering career with full-stack and cross-language breadth
Demonstrated knowledge sharing via workshops, talks, and courses
Some exposure to high-throughput services (Sociomantic/Dunnhumby, DLang microservices)
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ minimum — only a brief NI C/C++ role
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed-systems leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform leadership
